message:
refactor(scheduler): improve pop_with_lane tiebreak test determinism; add cross-entity liveness composition contract

priority.rs: Rewrite pop_with_lane_rng_tiebreak_among_equal_priority
test to use a deterministic closure-based runner, verify that identical
hint sequences produce identical pop orders (determinism), distinct
hints produce different orders (perturbation), and each run pops every
task exactly once (permutation completeness).

invariant_theorem_test_link_map.json: Add cross_entity_liveness_composition
contract linking cancel protocol, race loser drain, and close quiescence
theorem chains into end-to-end guarantees for cancellation-triggered
shutdown liveness.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
